Resolved: not a code defect. Demon Seal is a pre-allocated pool — RTP is set by PoolContract tier counts, and the populator constructs seals to hit a predetermined T (no independent draws). The ~146% was an invalid independent-seal model. Fixed: game-math skill P(T) table recalibrated to sum to 1.0 (loss T0-3=0.56708); DemonSealMonteCarloTest now asserts the pool RTP ~64.4% (closed-form) + 2-sigma distribution. Populator/evaluator unchanged.

ThemeSkinningService in luckledger-generation: skin(layout,theme)->TicketCard via symbolMap (throws on unmapped symbol), getAvailableThemes/getTheme over a constructor-injected registry. 6 tests. Added domain+mechanic deps to generation pom.

VerificationSuite in luckledger-generation: 6 checks (Pool Contract, Tier Counts, Payout Ratio, No False Positives, No Broken Winners, chi-squared Distribution Spread) + analyzeNearMisses (degrades gracefully for mechanics NearMissAnalyzer can't assess, e.g. DemonSeal). 6 tests.
Covered by ThemeSkinningServiceTest on main (6 tests)
Covered by VerificationSuiteTest on main (6 tests: happy path + tier/FP/spread failure modes + near-miss)

NearMissAnalyzer now has a Demon Seal point-accumulation path (T=2g+s, near-miss at T==3, distance=4-T). VerificationSuite.analyzeNearMisses no longer degrades for Demon Seal. NearMissAnalyzerTest 42, full reactor green.

Full mvn test green.

Persistence epic complete across phases 1-3: Flyway schema, full JPA entity graph with JSONB grids, Postgres-backed stores + transactional purchase/reveal gateways, Testcontainers coverage. All on main.

Vanilla-JS hash-routed SPA in luckledger-app static/: dealers/books/scratch/ledger views, Canvas destination-out scratch over the two ticket PNGs, full REST integration (player create/borrow, purchase, reveal, ledger). Spring Boot docker-compose support + compose.yaml so 'mvn -pl luckledger-app spring-boot:run' auto-starts Postgres; smoke-tested end-to-end (serve + play flow).
